text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle publicly proclaims her respect for
Hishi Akebono and declares war on her in the
same breath!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I fear Hishi Akebono might feel nervous after
being openly challenged, but she confidently
walks to the race with a smile on her face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd can't wait to see two of the biggest
racers go head-to-head as the curtain rises on the
Yasuda Kinen!
